name: Poppy Seed Hamantaschen
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 5 cups flour, salt and baking powder in a large bowl; mix well.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add shortening, 4 eggs and honey. Work together until dough is formed, adding flour as needed.
3. Roll out thinly on a floured surface and cut into 4-inch circles.
4. Place 1 tablespoon filling on each circle; fold up three sides and press together into triangles, leaving tops somewhat open.
5. Beat remaining egg with water and brush over the triangles.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until browned.
7. Grind the poppy seeds in a food processor.
8. Combine ground poppy seeds with milk and honey in a saucepan; cook over low heat until thickened, stirring frequently.
9. Add lemon peel and raisins to the mixture; stir until combined.
10. Cool completely before assembling the hamantaschen.
